candidates.title: Training and Development Specialist Distribution
candidates.snippet: The Training & Development Specialist supports the Distribution operating company by coordinating and delivering training activities that align with operational priorities, compliance requirements, and the approved training roadmap.

candidates.title: Learning and Development Specialist III
candidates.snippet: The Learning and Development Specialist III is responsible for ongoing design, deployment, delivery and evaluation of learning programs to enhance the performance and growth of teams to meet departmental goals.

candidates.title: Employee Relations Specialist
candidates.snippet: As a member of the Employee and Labor Relations Team in the Office of Human Resources, the Employee Relations Specialist uses professional methodologies and best practices to provide direct support to campus in handling employee relations matters.

candidates.title: Education Program Manager
candidates.company: Oregon Health & Science University (Cascade Life Alliance)
candidates.snippet: Comprehensive supervision and leadership of the Education Program, to include oversight of the design, implementation, standardization, and evaluation of education initiatives across all CLA departments.

candidates.title: HR Consultant
candidates.snippet: The HR Consultant serves as a consultant and advisor to leaders and caregivers on HR strategies and other related caregiver impacting initiatives. This includes identifying issues and consulting with appropriate internal resources.

candidates.title: Training & Development Analyst
candidates.snippet: The Training & Development Analyst is responsible for supporting end users of LAIKA's technical systems and tools, ensuring adoption and consistent use across the studio. Works with Technology Engagement & Development Supervisor to develop and deliver training.

candidates.title: Program Manager, People Team
candidates.snippet: Drive Program Strategy & Execution: You will take loose concepts or business problems and translate them into rigorous project charters. You define the 'what, why, and how,' manage the timeline, and ensure the team crosses the finish line.

candidates.title: Program Manager, Community Support
candidates.snippet: As a Program Manager in Community Support, you are responsible for implementing large-scale, cross-functional and cross-platform programs that drive the strategic goals of the Community Support organization and Airbnb.

candidates.title: Recruiting Coordinator
candidates.snippet: Responsible for assisting with full-cycle recruitments and providing search committee support. Salary $55,020-$61,898. NOTE: Initial posting restricted to current PSU employees. Close date 06/05/2026.

candidates.title: Program Manager, Community Engagement
candidates.snippet: Develops and facilitates student engagement opportunities through active learning and service. Supervises Campus Volunteer Coordinator program (3-6 student leaders), manages Community Service Work Study (15-25 students). Moreau Center. Starting $49,310.
candidates.yoe_signal: Minimum 2 years in social justice, community engagement, volunteer coordination

candidates.title: Program Manager, Social Justice Education
candidates.snippet: Advances Moreau Center Social Justice programming focused on increasing student involvement in social justice initiatives. Full-time exempt staff role.

candidates.title: Area Director for Student Staff Selection, Training, & Development
candidates.snippet: Leads recruitment, selection, and training of student and professional staff in University Housing & Dining. Master's degree required (College Student Services or related). 2 years professional experience in residential education. Salary $61,000-$67,000. Includes furnished apartment + meal plan. Closes 05/27/2026.
candidates.yoe_signal: 2 years professional experience in residential education

candidates.title: HR Specialist / Training & Development
candidates.snippet: Sandvik filed T&D Specialist $95K 2025. 11 open HR roles. Swedish industrial multinational, US ops Alachua FL.

candidates.title: Learning and Development Specialist
candidates.company: Carlos Rosario International Public Charter School
candidates.snippet: Cap-exempt charter school for adult immigrant education. $100K L&D Specialist LCA filed June 2025 for Oct start. Multilingual professionals targeted - Jamie's Chinese fluency is a plus.
